## Summary

## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` and `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] `./scripts/check-reproducible.sh` and `./scripts/check-no-attribution.sh` pass
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated for any user-visible change
- [ ] New numeric parameters carry a cited `provenance`; `docs/VALIDATION.md` updated
- [ ] No automated-tool attribution trailers; commits follow Conventional Commits
